description: CompositionPink sarong dress made of knitted blended viscose fabric, is elasticated at the back, has braided loops and an elasticated hemFitRegularWash careRinse seperatelyGentle hand wash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery and printLine dry inside outIron lowIt’s time to explore and discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with sepia.
